meta.description: Self-describing specification for a Kanecta pipeline — purpose, philosophy, step contracts, learning loops and planned integrations
meta.keywords: pipeline spec about description steps learning loops integrations

skills.claude: A Pipeline Spec is the 'about' document for a pipeline. It describes purpose, philosophy, each step's input/output contract, the improvement loops, and planned integrations. Referenced by the Pipeline item's 'about' field. Can be tagged org-context to inject pipeline knowledge into AI reasoning.

inputType.description: Human-readable name or UUID of the primary input type

outputType.description: Human-readable name or UUID of the primary output type

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_789975b9_817f_4a47_bdd4_8ca0cfc52b70" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "purpose" TEXT,
    "philosophy" TEXT,
    "version" TEXT,
    "input_type" TEXT,
    "output_type" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_789975b9_817f_4a47_bdd4_8ca0cfc52b70" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_789975b9817f4a47_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
